query:
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avatar` text;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `bio` text;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `website` varchar(512);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `githubHandle` varchar(128);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `categories` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `icon` varchar(64),
  `color` varchar(32),
  `skillCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `sortOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `categories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `categories_name_unique` UNIQUE(`name`),
  CONSTRAINT `categories_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skills` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `author` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `readme` text,
  `type` enum('prompt','agent','tool','rpa','workflow','template') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'prompt',
  `categoryId` int,
  `tags` json,
  `license` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'MIT',
  `version` varchar(32) DEFAULT '1.0.0',
  `downloads` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `likes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `forks` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `stars` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isPublic` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `isFeatured` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `compatibleModels` json,
  `inputSchema` json,
  `outputSchema` json,
  `config` json,
  `userId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `skills_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skill_files` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `skillId` int NOT NULL,
  `path` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `content` text,
  `size` int DEFAULT 0,
  `mimeType` varchar(128),
  `isDirectory` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `skill_files_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skill_commits` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `skillId` int NOT NULL,
  `hash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `message` text NOT NULL,
  `authorName` varchar(128),
  `additions` int DEFAULT 0,
  `deletions` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `skill_commits_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contexts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `author` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `readme` text,
  `format` varchar(64),
  `size` varchar(32),
  `rows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `tags` json,
  `license` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'MIT',
  `downloads` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `likes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isPublic` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `userId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `contexts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `playgrounds` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `author` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `readme` text,
  `runtime` varchar(64),
  `emoji` varchar(16),
  `tags` json,
  `likes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isPublic` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `userId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `playgrounds_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `discussions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `content` text,
  `status` enum('open','closed','resolved') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  `targetType` enum('skill','context','playground') NOT NULL,
  `targetId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int,
  `replyCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `discussions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `discussion_replies` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `discussionId` int NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `userId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `discussion_replies_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `likes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `targetType` enum('skill','context','playground') NOT NULL,
  `targetId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `likes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `organizations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `handle` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `avatar` text,
  `website` varchar(512),
  `type` varchar(64),
  `memberCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `skillCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `followerCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isVerified` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `organizations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `organizations_handle_unique` UNIQUE(`handle`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agents` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `author` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `readme` text,
  `skillIds` json,
  `modelIds` json,
  `config` json,
  `status` enum('draft','published','deployed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `deployUrl` text,
  `likes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `runs` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `userId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `agents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `blog_posts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `content` text,
  `excerpt` text,
  `coverImage` text,
  `authorName` varchar(128),
  `tags` json,
  `isPublished` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `views` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `blog_posts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `collections` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `itemCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `userId` int,
  `isPublic` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `collections_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
